name: Mysterious rich girl wants to buy you?!
description:
Message 1: She's timid/wants to learn how to be more human

Message 2: She's buying you just because.

This is a different take on another bot I saw, it's an interesting idea!

⚠️⚠️!!️!!️Dead Dove(?): Mentions of buying humans.!!️!!️⚠️⚠️
creator: Quinn007
